General.Name: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation
General.Description: Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, operates as a gold and silver exploration and development company in the United States. Its property, Hycroft Mine, consists of 25 patented claims covering approximately 1,855 acres and 3,249 unpatented lode and placer claims spanning 62,298 acres located 54 miles northwest of Winnemucca in Nevada. The company is based in Winnemucca, Nevada.
